global.description: The ad features a bold brand name and a clear call to action, promoting a new collection.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a special price.

elements.label: LuxShelf Brand Name
elements.description: A bold, prominent text element displaying the brand name 'LuxShelf' in a large font, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: New Collection Announcement
elements.description: A smaller text element stating 'New collection drop €29, g Book now', centered below the brand name, with a clean and modern font.

elements.label: Top Banner
elements.description: A thin, rectangular banner at the top of the ad, possibly in a contrasting color, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Call to Action Button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Book now', designed to stand out and encourage user interaction.

elements.label: Price Tag
elements.description: A larger text element displaying the price '€29.99', prominently placed in the lower section of the ad to attract attention.
elements.text_content: New collection drop €29, g Book now

elements.label: Ad Background
elements.description: A solid color background that complements the text elements, providing a cohesive look to the overall ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and vibrant, LuxShelf, new collection, €29.99, Book now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top center, the body text is centered below it, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, New collection drop €29, g Book now, €29.99
